results.title: How Stephen Curry-LeBron James dream pairing puts Jimmy Butler in an awkward spot? The trade rumor explained
results.description: The Warriors have emerged as a rumored destination for both Anthony Davis and LeBron James, but any blockbuster plan would likely require Jimmy Butler's contract to be moved as part of a salary-matching trade. While Butler's agent says Golden State remains committed to supporting his ACL recovery, reports suggest the franchise is exploring ways to maximize Stephen Curry's championship window. Washington's reluctance to absorb Butler's contract adds another layer of complexity, leaving Golden State facing difficult financial and roster decisions as NBA free agency begins.

results.title: Twins hit 3 homers to back Matthews, then hold off Astros rally in 9th for 5-4 victory
results.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Royce Lewis and Victor Caratini hit back-to-back homers, Zebby Matthews pitched seven stingy innings and the Minnesota Twins held off a late rally by the Houston Astros for a 5-4 victory Monday night.

results.title: Srikanth ends runner-up
results.description: Fullerton (USA), June 29: India’s Kidambi Srikanth ended his impressive run with a runner-up finish at the US Open Super 300 badminton tournament after going down fighting in three games to Chinese Taipei’s Su Li-yang in the men’s singles final here. The 33-year-old Srikanth, a silver-medallist at the 2021 World Championships, recovered from the loss [...]
